104 AC1I AC1I_FOOD_PREF (AC1I) Distinct Food Preferences CHAR 1 Customary routine: eating patterns - distinct food preferences. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
105 AC1J AC1J_EAT_BTWN_MEAL (AC1J) Eats Between Meals CHAR 1 Customary routine: eating patterns - eats between meals most days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
106 AC1K AC1K_ALC_WKLY (AC1K) Use of Alcoholic Beverages at Least Weekly
